 static const COL_DATA = 'client_data';

 static const COL_VALID = 'client_valid';


  Client([Map<String, dynamic> initialData = const {}])
      : super(

      name: ENTITY_NAME,
      prefix: PREFIX,
      columns: COLUMNS);

  @override
  Client get self {
    return this;

  @override
  String singlePKValue() {
    return '$id';
  }

  List<String> identifierColumns() {
    return [

    ];
  }

  Client fromJson(Map<String, dynamic> json) {
    return Client(json);
  }

  set gender(String nVal) { doSet(COL_GENDER, nVal, String); }

  set data(Map|List nVal) { doSet(COL_DATA, nVal, Map); }
  Map getData() { return data; }
